text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper is titled "Decoupled Weight Decay Regularization" (not "Decoded") by Ilya Loshchilov and Frank Hutter, published at ICLR 2019. The cited title "Decoded weight decay regularization" is a corruption/misremembering of the actual title, and the automated checkers could not find it under the given title — a classic sign of AI hallucination with a garbled title. The authors listed (L. Ilya, H. Frank) are also malformed reversals of the real authors' names.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1711.05101
